name: product-feed-optimizer
description: Use when the user asks to "optimize my Shopping feed", "fix product disapprovals", "improve product titles/attributes", or "build feed-driven PMax asset groups"; audits and rewrites the Shopping/Performance Max product feed — title/description patterns, required and recommended attributes, GTIN/availability/price hygiene, disapproval triage, and feed-driven asset-group / listing-group structure — informing the ROAS O (Offer) dimension. Not for text ad copy — use ad-creative-builder; not for scor
author: aaron-he-zhu
